data.title: Laravel Developers. Pizza. Community.
data.subtitle: Più di una semplice community
data.description: Unisciti a weekly pizza meetups con sviluppatori Laravel nella tua zona. Costruisci connessioni durature, impara nuove tecnologie e condividi la tua passione per il codice.

data.title: Perché unirti alla nostra community?
data.description: More than just pizza - it's about building lasting connections with developers who share your passion

features.title: Regular Meetups
features.description: Join weekly pizza meetups with Laravel developers in your area

features.title: Growing Community
features.description: Connect with passionate developers who love Laravel and pizza

features.title: Multiple Locations
features.description: Find meetups in cities around the world

features.title: Real-time Chat
features.description: Stay connected with the community between meetups

data.title: Pronto a unirti?
data.description: Trova il prossimo meetup Laravel Pizza vicino a te. Pizza, codice e amicizia ti aspettano!
